title: たづなとの絆・憧れを託して

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna invites me out for a slightly late New
Year's shrine visit.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Wow... The New Year's festivities are already
over, but there are still so many people here!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, speaking of the midwinter crowds, this
reminds me of last year's Arima Kinen.
choice_data_list: That's right, there was a huge turnout!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Wasn't there?! It's the big year-end event, after
all! The perfect end to all the G1 races that start
in autumn!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And on the topic of the Arima Kinen, it's a really
important race for so many Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Only the chosen few can stand upon that
stage—the ones who performed the best that year
and won the hearts of the fans...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Racers from every generation dream of standing
tall at Nakayama Racecourse at the end of the
year.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: That's right... They all yearn for it.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And somehow, I feel that yearning too! I know it's
a little far away, but why don't we head to
Nakayama Racecourse for a quick peek?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Visiting a shrine for the New Year is great
and all, but the bustle of the racetrack is on a
whole other level!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There are people at the racetrack to watch
Umamusume run today as well.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Trainer. Please continue to support your trainee.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I'll be rooting for the both of you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that my friendship with Tazuna
will continue to grow from here.
